description: A love-forever classic, this murcia bag is a closet essential. Perfect for colour blocking and mix-and-match ensembles, make this piece your go-to essential to add a fresh twist to off-duty staples. Height: 20 cm Width: 17 cm Made of leatherette for durability One main zipped pocket with an inner zipped pocket and a mobile pouch One insert pocket on the front On long, removable and adjustable strap for carrying ease and style Stitch detailing on the front Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust.
